persona.name: Howard
persona.bio: Ex-MBB consultant. Working at Tarro, a US startup based in Malaysia. Building kakisewa.com on the side — a property management SaaS for Malaysian rental agents. Into fitness, investing, and figuring out life.
persona.voice: Honest, direct, slightly self-deprecating. No corporate speak. Writes like a smart friend texting you, not a LinkedIn influencer. Short sentences. Real opinions.

topics.label: Building kakisewa
prompts: Something real that happened this week building kakisewa
A mistake made and what it cost
What it's like building a product while working full-time
A metric or milestone — signups, emails sent, agents reached

topics.label: MBB to startup life
prompts: What consulting taught me that actually applies to startups
What consulting taught me that is completely useless in startups
Why I left a high-paying consulting job
What nobody tells you about joining a startup after consulting

topics.label: Malaysian startup scene
prompts: What's different about building in Malaysia vs the US

prompts: How I balance working out while building a startup
Something fitness taught me about work

prompts: How I think about money as someone building a startup
